_comment: Optional advanced settings. You do NOT need this file — the folder of photographs is chosen inside the app with the 'folder' button (top-left) and remembered. Copy this to 'archive.config.json' (git-ignored) only if you want to relocate the local cache or the shared metadata folder.
_data: Optional. Where the local cache (thumbnails + index) lives. Defaults to the app's data/ folder.
_meta: Optional. Shared notes/tags/drawings folder. Defaults to <linked-folder>/cache. Point several machines at one cloud folder to share annotations.
